notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Jahmai Jones out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.
